They are a non-mutating runbook layer over the approved Vanderbilt candidate review batch packets and the hardened blank manual decision template. They do not fill reviewer decisions, approve people, ingest people, close denominators, verify Vanderbilt as a school, rewrite URLs, publish raw candidate labels or raw person URLs, accept enrichment facts, or collapse identities.
